title: Supreme Court Anuradha Bhasin Internet Shutdowns
excerpt: Supreme Court framed legality around internet shutdown restrictions.
keyFacts: Anuradha Bhasin is foundational for internet shutdown legality.
legalHoldings: Restrictions on internet access must satisfy legality, necessity, and proportionality principles.
limitations: Older precedent used as doctrine, not 2022-2025 event data.
